12.title: Calculus: Complete Guide
12.content:
• DIFFERENTIATION: Measures the rate of change. Rules: Product Rule [u'v + uv'], Quotient Rule [(u'v - uv')/v^2].
• INTEGRATION: The reverse process of differentiation. Fundamental theorem: ∫f(x)dx = F(x) + C.
• APPLICATIONS: Finding area under curves, tangents, and normals. Important formulas: ∫1/x dx = log|x|, ∫e^x dx = e^x.
• DIFFERENTIAL EQUATIONS: Solving equations with derivatives using variable separable or linear methods.

12.title: Vectors & 3D Geometry
12.content:
• VECTORS: Magnitude |a| = √(x^2+y^2+z^2). Dot Product: a.b = |a||b|cosθ. Cross Product: a x b = |a||b|sinθ n̂.
• 3D GEOMETRY: Distance formula, direction cosines (l, m, n). Equation of line: r = a + λb. Shortest distance between skew lines formula is vital for exams.

11.title: Trigonometry & Sets
11.content:
• TRIGONOMETRY: Radians to Degrees conversion (π = 180°). Domain and Range of sin, cos, tan. Multiple angle formulas like sin2A = 2sinAcosA.
• SETS: Union (A∪B), Intersection (A∩B), and Subsets (2^n). Venn diagrams help visualize relations between sets.

11.title: Conic Sections
11.content:
• CIRCLE: (x-h)^2 + (y-k)^2 = r^2.
• PARABOLA: y^2 = 4ax (Focus at a,0).
• ELLIPSE: x^2/a^2 + y^2/b^2 = 1 (e < 1).
• HYPERBOLA: x^2/a^2 - y^2/b^2 = 1 (e > 1).

10.title: Algebra & Geometry
10.content:
• QUADRATIC: ax^2 + bx + c = 0. Roots found via Quadratic Formula. Sum of roots = -b/a, Product = c/a.
• AP: Arithmetic Progression. an = a + (n-1)d. Sum Sn = n/2[2a + (n-1)d].
• TRIANGLES: Similarity criteria (AAA, SAS, SSS). Pythagoras Theorem: H^2 = P^2 + B^2.

9.title: Number System & Mensuration
9.content:
• NUMBERS: Rational, Irrational, and Real numbers. Laws of exponents apply.
• POLYNOMIALS: Remainder and Factor theorems. (a+b)^2 = a^2+2ab+b^2.
• AREA: Heron's Formula √s(s-a)(s-b)(s-c). Surface area of spheres (4πr^2) and cones (πrl).

8.title: Math Fundamentals
8.content:
• RATIONAL NUMBERS: Closure, Commutative, and Associative properties.
• ALGEBRA: Solving linear equations in one variable. Powers and Exponents: a^m * a^n = a^(m+n).
• GEOMETRY: Properties of quadrilaterals (Parallelogram, Rhombus, Rectangle, Square).
